summary: Primary care management split into clear premenopausal and postmenopausal subsections.
RMI now explicitly explained with calculation components and action threshold.
Follow-up timing made explicit (6-month repeat scan, 12-month discharge if stable in selected groups).
Layout changed to reduce unnecessary bullets and improve quick-read flow for GPs.
editor_checklist: Confirm whether to keep the RMI formula detail inline or move to a short callout box.
Confirm local wording for repeat-scan interval (3 months vs 3-6 months).
